sql.query: SELECT c.id,c.spaceId,c.configurationName,c.seatedCapacity,c.standingCapacity,c.maximumTotalCapacity,c.isDefault,c.isActive,CONCAT(c.configurationName,CASE WHEN c.maximumTotalCapacity IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(' (max ',c.maximumTotalCapacity,')') ELSE '' END,CASE WHEN c.isActive=0 THEN ' (inactive)' ELSE '' END) AS configurationLabel FROM tbl_space_configurations c INNER JOIN tbl_spaces s ON s.id=c.spaceId AND s.tenantId=c.tenantId WHERE c.tenantId=:tenantId AND c.spaceId=COALESCE(NULLIF(:spaceId,0),(SELECT w.spaceId FROM tbl_workflows w WHERE w.id=:workflowId AND w.tenantId=:tenantId2 LIMIT 1)) AND (c.isActive=1 OR c.id=:selectedId) ORDER BY c.isActive DESC,c.isDefault DESC,c.sortOrder,c.configurationName
